'''yakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mechatronically|mechatronically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mechatronically|mechatronically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yakate|yakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yakatesher|yakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yakatesherĂ«m|yakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yakatero|yakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yakateshĂ«|yakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yakateshĂ«m|yakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyakatero|gokiyakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyakateshĂ«|gokiyakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyakateshĂ«m|gokiyakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyakankerom|goyakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyakankeshĂ«|goyakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyakankeshĂ«m|goyakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyakankeya|goyakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yakaterom|yakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yakatemu|yakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yakateya|yakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyakaterom|gokiyakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyakatemu|gokiyakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyakateya|gokiyakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yakakate|yakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yakakatesher|yakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yakakatesherĂ«m|yakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yakakatero|yakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yakakateshĂ«|yakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yakakateshĂ«m|yakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyakakatero|gokiyakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyakakateshĂ«|gokiyakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyakakateshĂ«m|gokiyakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyakakankerom|goyakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyakakankeshĂ«|goyakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyakakankeshĂ«m|goyakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyakakankeya|goyakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yakakaterom|yakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yakakatemu|yakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yakakateya|yakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyakakaterom|gokiyakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyakakatemu|gokiyakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyakakateya|gokiyakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠkĂŠte|yĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠkĂŠtesher|yĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠkĂŠtero|yĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠkĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠkĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠkĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠkĂŠterom|yĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠkĂŠtemu|yĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠkĂŠteya|yĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠkĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠkĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafkafte|yafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafkaftesher|yafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafkaftesherĂ«m|yafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafkaftero|yafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafkafteshĂ«|yafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafkafteshĂ«m|yafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafkaftero|gokiyafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafkafteshĂ«|gokiyafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafkafteshĂ«m|gokiyafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafkafnkerom|goyafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafkafnkeshĂ«|goyafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafkafnkeshĂ«m|goyafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafkafnkeya|goyafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafkafterom|yafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafkaftemu|yafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafkafteya|yafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafkafterom|gokiyafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafkaftemu|gokiyafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafkafteya|gokiyafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
